mapper.insert: insert into warehouse_sku(warehouse_id, dish_id, stock, lock_stock, status) values (#{warehouseId}, #{dishId}, #{stock}, #{lockStock}, #{status})
mapper.select: select id, warehouse_id as warehouseId, dish_id as dishId, stock, lock_stock as lockStock, status from warehouse_sku where id = #{id}
select id, warehouse_id as warehouseId, dish_id as dishId, stock, lock_stock as lockStock, status from warehouse_sku where warehouse_id = #{warehouseId} and dish_id = #{dishId} limit 1
